title: BlastEm Canonical Evidence Artifact
description: Main evidence artifact written to out/logs/blastem_evidence.json. Extends the common artifact envelope with BlastEm-specific capture fields.

session_started.description: Whether the emulator session was successfully started

session_completed.description: Whether the session completed without fatal errors

screenshot_present.description: Whether a screenshot was captured and exists on disk

sram_present.description: Whether SRAM was captured and exists on disk

vdp_dump_present.description: Whether a VDP dump was captured and exists on disk

evidence_status.description: Status of the evidence bundle completeness

evidence_root.description: Absolute path to the evidence output directory

session_manifest_path.description: Absolute path to the detailed session manifest JSON

duration_ms.description: Total capture session duration in milliseconds
